product_overview: Ruang Baca Informatika is a library and academic document portal that lets visitors browse books and thesis collections, search the catalog, and contact the library. Registered members can manage borrowing-related tasks, check document similarity, and access kiosk-based library operations.
core_goals: Browse the library homepage and discover featured books and announcements
Search and filter books in the catalog
View detailed information for books and academic documents
Submit contact inquiries to the library
Complete member onboarding and profile setup
Manage book borrowing requests and loan history
Use kiosk functions for borrowing, returns, and visit recording

features.name: Homepage Features
features.description: Lets visitors explore the homepage, discover popular and new books, and navigate to other sections of the site.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View popular books section -> View new books section -> Click a navigation link -> Open another page

features.name: Book Catalog & Search
features.description: Allows visitors to search and filter the book catalog and review matching results.
user_flows: Navigate to /books -> Type a search query -> Select filters -> Submit the search -> See matching book results
Navigate to /search -> Review the search results list -> Open a book from the results -> See the selected book details

features.name: Book Details
features.description: Shows detailed information for a selected book and allows logged-in users to add it to a borrowing draft.
user_flows: Navigate to /books/{book:slug} -> View the book details -> Add the book to the borrow draft -> See the draft updated
Navigate to /books/{book:slug} -> View the book details -> Try to add the book to the borrow draft without being logged in -> See that borrowing draft access is unavailable

features.name: Academic Document Listings
features.description: Lets visitors browse undergraduate thesis, internship report, and master thesis collections and open individual record details.
user_flows: Navigate to /skripsi -> Browse the undergraduate thesis list -> Open a thesis record -> See the thesis details
Navigate to /internship-reports -> Browse the internship report list -> Open a report record -> See the report details
Navigate to /thesis -> Browse the master thesis list -> Open a thesis record -> See the thesis details

features.name: About and Policy Pages
features.description: Provides informational pages about the library, its team, privacy policy, and terms of service.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Read the library overview -> Open the team page -> Review team information
Navigate to /privacy-policy -> Read the privacy policy
Navigate to /terms-of-service -> Read the terms of service

features.name: Contact Library
features.description: Allows visitors to send questions, feedback, or requests through the contact form.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill in the name -> Fill in the email address -> Write the message -> Submit the contact form -> See the form submitted

features.name: Member Registration & Onboarding
features.description: Supports member profile completion after OAuth sign-in and WhatsApp verification during onboarding.
user_flows: Navigate to /register/profile -> Complete sign-in through Google OAuth -> Fill in profile information -> Submit the profile form -> Receive the WhatsApp verification step
Navigate to /register/whatsapp -> Receive the verification code on WhatsApp -> Enter the verification code -> Submit the code -> Complete phone verification

features.name: Similarity Checker
features.description: Lets authenticated members upload an academic document and review the similarity check output.
user_flows: Navigate to /similarity -> Choose a document file -> Run the similarity check -> Review the similarity percentage and report

features.name: Book Borrow Request Draft
features.description: Allows authenticated members to review books saved for borrowing, remove items, and generate a QR code for physical borrowing.
user_flows: Navigate to /loans/request -> Review the current borrow draft -> Remove a book from the draft -> See the draft updated
Navigate to /loans/request -> Review the current borrow draft -> Generate the borrowing QR code -> See the QR code for borrowing

features.name: Loan History & Returns
features.description: Lets authenticated members review active loans and past loans, and generate a QR code for returns.
user_flows: Navigate to /loans/history -> Review active borrowed books -> Review completed borrowing history -> Select a borrowed book for return -> Generate the return QR code -> See the return QR code

features.name: Member Settings
features.description: Lets authenticated members update profile details and security preferences.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/profile -> Update profile information -> Save the changes -> See the updated profile details
Navigate to /settings/security -> Update security preferences -> Save the changes -> See the updated security settings

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Lets authenticated members view their notification list.
user_flows: Navigate to /notifications -> Review the notification list -> Open a notification item -> See its details

features.name: Kiosk Operations
features.description: Supports kiosk-based operations for unlocking the terminal, recording visits, and completing borrowing or return transactions via QR scanning.
user_flows: Navigate to /kiosk -> Enter the kiosk PIN -> Unlock the kiosk -> Start a member registration or guest visit flow
Navigate to /kiosk -> Unlock the kiosk -> Scan a borrowing QR code from the mobile app -> Complete the borrowing transaction
Navigate to /kiosk -> Unlock the kiosk -> Scan a return QR code from the mobile app -> Complete the return transaction

routes.description: Detail view of a single book
Book loan history and returns page
Complete member profile setup page after OAuth registration
Verify WhatsApp phone number page during onboarding
Kiosk mode page for scanning and local library operations

features.name: Homepage Features
features.description: Browse popular books, new books, and check announcements

features.name: Book Catalog & Search
features.description: Search and filter the library books catalog
user_interactions: Type search query into search input field
Press enter or click search button

features.name: Book Details
features.description: View individual book details and add to borrowing draft
user_interactions: Click "Add to Borrow Draft" button if logged in

features.name: Member Registration & Onboarding
features.description: Connect account via Google OAuth and complete registration profile
user_interactions: Fill profile information (identity number, phone, address)
Fill and submit WhatsApp verification OTP

features.name: Contact Library
features.description: Contact page form for submitting feedback or queries

features.name: Similarity Checker
features.description: Upload and verify similarity of academic documents
user_interactions: View similarity percentage and details report

features.name: Book Borrow Request Draft
features.description: Manage books added to borrow draft and generate QR code for physical borrowing
user_interactions: Click remove book button to discard a book
Click "Generate QR Code" to show borrowing QR

features.name: Loan History & Returns
features.description: View current active loans, historical loans, and generate return QR
user_interactions: Select book and click return button to generate return QR code

features.name: Kiosk Operations
features.description: Physical kiosk actions including scanning and guest visits
user_interactions: Click Member Registration or Guest Visit buttons
Scan QR codes from mobile app to complete transaction
